---
title: "itm_CODEXgroups_nichenet"
author: "xb"
date: "2025-03-20"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
library(nichenetr)
library(Seurat)
library(SeuratObject)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
seuratObj <- readRDS("seurat_objects/ITM_n24_AllCells_PDEMUX_cleaned_filtered_CODEX_markers_9May25.rds")
Idents(seuratObj) <- seuratObj@meta.data$cath_grouped_Minor_exp
seuratObj@meta.data %>% head()
```

```{r}
# Additionally, if your expression data has the older gene symbols, you may want to use our alias #conversion function to avoid the loss of gene names.
#seuratObj <- alias_to_symbol_seurat(seuratObj, "human")
```

```{r}
seuratObj@meta.data$cath_grouped_Minor_exp %>% table() 
     # B_cell       CD4_T       CD8_T          DC Endothelial  Macrophage  Melanocyte 
     #    357        1061        2221         101         270        1958       71994 
```

```{r}
lr_network <- readRDS("nichenet_data/lr_network_human_21122021.rds")
ligand_target_matrix <- readRDS("nichenet_data/ligand_target_matrix_nsga2r_final.rds")
weighted_networks <- readRDS("nichenet_data/weighted_networks_nsga2r_final.rds")
```

```{r}
head(lr_network)
ligand_target_matrix[1:5,1:5] # target genes in rows, ligands in columns
head(weighted_networks$lr_sig) # interactions and their weights in the ligand-receptor + signaling network
head(weighted_networks$gr) # interactions and their weights in the gene regulatory network
```

```{r}
run_nichenet_analysis <- function(receiver_celltype, sender_celltypes, condition_oi, condition_reference, seuratObj, output_file, 
                                  save_tables = TRUE, summary_file = "nichenet_ligand_summary.csv") {
  suppressMessages({
    library(nichenetr)
    library(Seurat)
    library(SeuratObject)
    library(tidyverse)
    library(cowplot)
    library(ggpubr)
    library(glue)
    library(grid)      # for unit()
    library(scales)    # for pretty_breaks()
  })

  message(glue("Running NicheNet: Receiver = {receiver_celltype}, {condition_oi} vs {condition_reference}"))

  # Load NicheNet reference files
  lr_network <- readRDS("nichenet_data/lr_network_human_21122021.rds")
  ligand_target_matrix <- readRDS("nichenet_data/ligand_target_matrix_nsga2r_final.rds")
  weighted_networks <- readRDS("nichenet_data/weighted_networks_nsga2r_final.rds")

  Idents(seuratObj) <- seuratObj@meta.data$cath_grouped_Minor_exp
  expressed_genes_receiver <- get_expressed_genes(receiver_celltype, seuratObj, pct = 0.05)

  all_receptors <- unique(lr_network$to)  
  expressed_receptors <- intersect(all_receptors, expressed_genes_receiver)
  potential_ligands <- lr_network %>% filter(to %in% expressed_receptors) %>% pull(from) %>% unique()

  list_expressed_genes_sender <- sender_celltypes %>% unique() %>% lapply(get_expressed_genes, seuratObj, 0.1)
  expressed_genes_sender <- list_expressed_genes_sender %>% unlist() %>% unique()
  potential_ligands_focused <- intersect(potential_ligands, expressed_genes_sender) 

  seurat_obj_receiver <- subset(seuratObj, idents = receiver_celltype)

  DE_table_receiver <- FindMarkers(
    object = seurat_obj_receiver,
    ident.1 = condition_oi, ident.2 = condition_reference,
    group.by = "cath_timepoint_response",
    min.pct = 0.01) %>% rownames_to_column("gene")

  geneset_oi <- DE_table_receiver %>%
    filter(gene %in% rownames(ligand_target_matrix)) %>%
    filter(p_val <= 0.05) %>%  ### remove if not enough DEG
    slice_max(order_by = abs(avg_log2FC), n = 100) %>%
    pull(gene) %>%
    .[. %in% rownames(ligand_target_matrix)]

  background_expressed_genes <- expressed_genes_receiver %>% .[. %in% rownames(ligand_target_matrix)]

  message(glue("  - DE genes in ligand matrix: {length(geneset_oi)}"))
  message(glue("  - Focused potential ligands: {length(potential_ligands_focused)}"))

  if (length(geneset_oi) < 10) {
    message(glue("  ⚠ Skipped: Too few DE genes for {receiver_celltype} {condition_oi} vs {condition_reference}"))
    return(NULL)
  }

  if (length(potential_ligands_focused) < 5) {
    message(glue("  ⚠ Skipped: Too few potential ligands for {receiver_celltype} {condition_oi} vs {condition_reference}"))
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Try prediction
  ligand_activities <- tryCatch({
    predict_ligand_activities(
      geneset = geneset_oi,
      background_expressed_genes = background_expressed_genes,
      ligand_target_matrix = ligand_target_matrix,
      potential_ligands = potential_ligands
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    message(glue("  ❌ Failed ligand activity prediction: {e$message}"))
    return(NULL)
  })

  if (is.null(ligand_activities)) return(NULL)

  ligand_activities <- ligand_activities %>%
    arrange(-aupr_corrected) %>%
    mutate(rank = rank(desc(aupr_corrected)))

  best_upstream_ligands <- ligand_activities %>%
    filter(test_ligand %in% potential_ligands_focused) %>%
    top_n(30, aupr_corrected) %>% arrange(-aupr_corrected) %>%
    pull(test_ligand) %>% unique()

  if (length(best_upstream_ligands) == 0) {
    message(glue("  ⚠ Skipped: No high-ranking ligands found for {receiver_celltype} {condition_oi} vs {condition_reference}"))
    return(NULL)
  }

  # ==== Visualizations ====
  ligand_aupr_matrix <- ligand_activities %>% filter(test_ligand %in% best_upstream_ligands) %>%
    column_to_rownames("test_ligand") %>% select(aupr_corrected) %>% arrange(aupr_corrected)
  vis_ligand_aupr <- as.matrix(ligand_aupr_matrix, ncol = 1)

  range_aupr <- range(vis_ligand_aupr, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  p_ligand_aupr <- make_heatmap_ggplot(
    vis_ligand_aupr,
    "Prioritized ligands", "Ligand activity",
    legend_title = "AUPR", color = "darkorange"
  ) +
    # override scale to have fewer breaks
    scale_fill_gradient(
      low = "white", high = "darkorange",
      breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 3)
    ) +
    guides(
      fill = guide_colorbar(
        barheight = unit(0.4, "cm"),  # longer bar
        barwidth  = unit(4, "cm")
      )
    ) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x.top  = element_blank(),
      legend.text      = element_text(size = 7),
      legend.title     = element_text(size = 8),
      legend.key.height = unit(0.4, "cm")
    )

  p_dotplot <- DotPlot(subset(seuratObj, cath_grouped_Minor_exp %in% sender_celltypes),
                       features = rev(best_upstream_ligands), cols = "RdYlBu") + 
    coord_flip() +
    scale_y_discrete(position = "right")

  celltype_order <- levels(Idents(seuratObj)) 
  DE_table_top_ligands <- lapply(
    celltype_order[celltype_order %in% sender_celltypes],
    get_lfc_celltype, 
    seurat_obj = seuratObj,
    condition_colname = "cath_timepoint_response",
    condition_oi = condition_oi,
    condition_reference = condition_reference,
    celltype_col = "cath_grouped_Minor_exp",
    min.pct = 0, logfc.threshold = 0,
    features = best_upstream_ligands 
  ) %>% reduce(full_join) %>% column_to_rownames("gene")

  vis_ligand_lfc <- as.matrix(DE_table_top_ligands[rev(best_upstream_ligands), , drop = FALSE])
  range_lfc <- range(vis_ligand_lfc, na.rm = TRUE)

  p_lfc <- make_threecolor_heatmap_ggplot(
    vis_ligand_lfc,
    "Prioritized ligands", "LFC in Sender",
    low_color = "midnightblue", mid_color = "white",
    mid = median(vis_ligand_lfc, na.rm = TRUE), high_color = "red",
    legend_title = "LFC"
  ) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = "midnightblue",
      mid = "white",
      high = "red",
      midpoint = median(vis_ligand_lfc, na.rm = TRUE),
      breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 3)
    ) +
    guides(
      fill = guide_colorbar(
        barheight = unit(0.4, "cm"),
        barwidth  = unit(4, "cm")
      )
    ) +
    theme(
      legend.text       = element_text(size = 7),
      legend.title      = element_text(size = 8),
      legend.key.height = unit(0.4, "cm")
    )

  active_ligand_target_links_df <- best_upstream_ligands %>%
    lapply(get_weighted_ligand_target_links,
           geneset = geneset_oi,
           ligand_target_matrix = ligand_target_matrix,
           n = 100) %>%
    bind_rows() %>% drop_na()

  active_ligand_target_links <- prepare_ligand_target_visualization(
    ligand_target_df = active_ligand_target_links_df,
    ligand_target_matrix = ligand_target_matrix,
    cutoff = 0.33) 

  order_ligands <- intersect(best_upstream_ligands, colnames(active_ligand_target_links)) %>% rev()
  order_targets <- active_ligand_target_links_df$target %>% unique() %>% intersect(rownames(active_ligand_target_links))

  vis_ligand_target <- t(active_ligand_target_links[order_targets,order_ligands])

  range_lt <- range(vis_ligand_target, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  p_ligand_target <- make_heatmap_ggplot(
    vis_ligand_target, "Prioritized ligands", "Predicted target genes",
    color = "purple", legend_title = "Regulatory potential"
  ) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = "whitesmoke",
      mid = "white",
      high = "purple",
      midpoint = median(vis_ligand_target, na.rm = TRUE),
      breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 3)
    ) +
    guides(
      fill = guide_colorbar(
        barheight = unit(0.4, "cm"),
        barwidth  = unit(4, "cm")
      )
    ) +
    theme(
      legend.text       = element_text(size = 7),
      legend.title      = element_text(size = 8),
      legend.key.height = unit(0.4, "cm")
    )

  figures_without_legend <- cowplot::plot_grid(
    p_ligand_aupr + theme(legend.position = "none"),
    p_dotplot + theme(legend.position = "none",
                      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
                      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
                      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
                      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
                      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9,  angle = 90, hjust = 0)) +
      ylab("Expression in Sender"),
    p_lfc + theme(legend.position = "none",
                  axis.title.y = element_blank()),
    p_ligand_target + theme(legend.position = "none",
                            axis.title.y = element_blank()),
    align = "hv",
    nrow = 1,
    rel_widths = c(ncol(vis_ligand_aupr)+6, ncol(vis_ligand_lfc)+7, ncol(vis_ligand_lfc)+8, ncol(vis_ligand_target)))

  legends <- cowplot::plot_grid(
    ggpubr::as_ggplot(ggpubr::get_legend(p_ligand_aupr)),
    ggpubr::as_ggplot(ggpubr::get_legend(p_dotplot)),
    ggpubr::as_ggplot(ggpubr::get_legend(p_lfc)),
    ggpubr::as_ggplot(ggpubr::get_legend(p_ligand_target)),
    nrow = 1,
    align = "h", rel_widths = c(1.5, 1, 1, 1))

  combined_plot_raw <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  figures_without_legend, legends,
  rel_heights = c(10, 5), nrow = 2, align = "hv"
)

  combined_plot <- cowplot::ggdraw(combined_plot_raw) +
    theme(
      plot.margin = margin(t = 5.5, r = 40, b = 5.5, l = 5.5, unit = "pt")
    )
  
  ggsave(
    output_file,
    plot = combined_plot,
    width = 30, height = 22, units = "cm",
    dpi = 500,
    limitsize = FALSE
  )

  if (save_tables) {
    dir.create("tables", showWarnings = FALSE)
    write_csv(DE_table_receiver, file.path("tables", paste0("DE_table_", receiver_celltype, "_", condition_oi, "_vs_", condition_reference, ".csv")))
    write_csv(ligand_activities, file.path("tables", paste0("ligand_activities_", receiver_celltype, "_", condition_oi, "_vs_", condition_reference, ".csv")))
  }

  write_csv(tibble(receiver = receiver_celltype,
                   condition_oi = condition_oi,
                   condition_reference = condition_reference,
                   top_ligands = paste(best_upstream_ligands, collapse = ";")),
            summary_file, append = file.exists(summary_file))

  message(glue("  ✅ Completed: {receiver_celltype} {condition_oi} vs {condition_reference}"))
}
```


```{r}
### Test
run_nichenet_analysis(
  receiver_celltype = "Melanocyte",
  sender_celltypes = c("CD4_T", "B_cell", "Endothelial", "DC","Macrophage", "Melanocyte", "Lymph_endo", "Treg"),
  condition_oi = "PRE_Resistant",
  condition_reference = "PRE_Responsive",
  seuratObj = seuratObj,
  output_file = "plots/nichenet/nichenet_Melanocyte_PRE_Resistant_vs_PRE_Responsive.png",
  save_tables = TRUE,
  summary_file = "nichenet_data/nichenet_results_tables/nichenet_Melanocyte_ligand_summary.csv"
)
```

```{r}
### Test
run_nichenet_analysis(
  receiver_celltype = "Melanocyte",
  sender_celltypes = c("CD4_T", "B_cell", "Endothelial", "DC","Macrophage", "Melanocyte", "Lymph_endo", "Treg"),
  condition_oi = "PROG_Resistant",
  condition_reference = "PRE_Responsive",
  seuratObj = seuratObj,
  output_file = "plots/nichenet/nichenet_Melanocyte_PROG_Resistant_vs_PRE_Responsive.png",
  save_tables = TRUE,
  summary_file = "nichenet_data/nichenet_results_tables/nichenet_Melanocyte_ligand_summary_PRE-PROG.csv"
)
```

```{r}
# Define all receiver cell types to test (excluding Endothelial if already done)
receiver_celltypes <- c("DC", "Macrophage", "B_cell", "Treg", "CD8_T", "CD4_T", "Lymph_endo", "Melanocyte")

# All possible pairwise comparisons between your 3 groups
conditions <- c("PRE_Responsive", "PRE_Resistant", "PROG_Resistant")
pairwise_conditions <- combn(conditions, 2, simplify = FALSE)

# Optional: load your Seurat object
#seuratObj <- readRDS("seurat_objects/ITM_n24_AllCells_PDEMUX_cleaned_filtered_CODEX_markers_9May25.rds")

# Run NicheNet for each receiver + condition pair
for (receiver in receiver_celltypes) {
  sender_celltypes <- setdiff(unique(seuratObj@meta.data$cath_grouped_Minor_exp), receiver)

  for (pair in pairwise_conditions) {
    condition_reference <- pair[1]
    condition_oi <- pair[2]

    # Define output filename
    output_file <- paste0("plots/nichenet_", receiver, "_", condition_oi, "_vs_", condition_reference, ".png")

    # Run analysis
    tryCatch({
      run_nichenet_analysis(
        receiver_celltype = receiver,
        sender_celltypes = sender_celltypes,
        condition_oi = condition_oi,
        condition_reference = condition_reference,
        seuratObj = seuratObj,
        output_file = output_file,
        save_tables = TRUE,
        summary_file = "nichenet_ligand_summary.csv"
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      message(paste("Failed for", receiver, condition_oi, "vs", condition_reference, ":", e$message))
    })
  }
}
```
